title: 40cm Christmas Wreath with Silver Jingle Bells Stars Pine Cones Berries Leaves for Outdoor Xmas Home Office Mantelpiece Decorations
features: 🔔🍒⭐ Jingle Bells Christmas wreath is decorated with silver bells, stars, pine cones and red berries.

🔔🍒⭐ This wreath is made of premium PVC, metal and plastic materials. The metal bells make it stronger and can use for long time. This wreath can be reused. The color of the leaves and the other decorations will stay for a long time. No need of any extra maintenance.
🔔🍒⭐ Wide Application: Perfect for front door, wall, fireplace and anywhere indoors or outdoors. If it is outdoors, it is recommended to hang it on the covered porch to avoid direct sunlight and rain.
🔔🍒⭐ The Christmas wreath is 16 inch approx. (40cm) in Diameter. It is perfect size for any fireplaces, walls or doors to hang on and suitable for both indoor and outdoor usage.
🔔🍒⭐Christmas Element: It has all Christmas decorations on it. 9 jingle bells, stars, pinecones, berries and green leaves which looks like natural.
description: This 40cm Wreath can be used in a variety of places around your home such as the mantelpiece, your shelf, your wall or even your door. Unique design and multiple colour choice make it perfect wall decoration for your home. It gives you natural like look due to it's realistic like colours which will last long enough. It is made from UV resistant material so you can use it outdoor without any worries it will last for years and you can decorate it years after years. You can easily store it away after usage and again you can decorate it as it requires very minimum time to assemble it.

specifications_table.Included components: ‎Jingle Bell Wreath With Silver Bells Stars Pinecones and Red Berries 40cm
